skills.name: Alexa Skill Management
skills.description: Create, update, test, and deploy Alexa skills including interaction models, intent handlers, and slot types
examples: Create a new Alexa skill with a custom intent for ordering coffee
Update the interaction model to add a new slot type for drink sizes
Deploy the skill to the development stage and run certification tests

skills.name: Alexa Conversation Design
skills.description: Design and optimize voice user interfaces, dialog flows, multi-turn conversations, and ACDL dialogs for Alexa
examples: Design a multi-turn dialog flow for a restaurant reservation skill
Optimize the error handling and re-prompts for better user experience
Create an ACDL dialog for a smart home device control scenario

skills.name: Alexa Backend Integration
skills.description: Build and maintain Lambda functions, API integrations, DynamoDB persistence, and account linking for Alexa skills
examples: Write a Lambda handler for a new intent that queries a REST API
Set up DynamoDB persistence for user preferences across sessions
Configure account linking with OAuth 2.0 for a third-party service

skills.name: Alexa Testing & Certification
skills.description: Automated testing, simulation, utterance profiler analysis, and certification preparation for Alexa skills
examples: Generate test cases for all intents and edge cases in the skill
Run the utterance profiler to identify conflicts between intents
Prepare the skill for certification by checking all policy requirements

skills.name: Alexa Analytics & Optimization
skills.description: Analyze skill usage metrics, identify drop-off points, optimize engagement, and improve skill discoverability
examples: Analyze the skill usage funnel and identify where users are dropping off
Suggest improvements to increase daily active users and session duration
Optimize the skill's name, invocation phrases, and category for discoverability

skills.name: Alexa Smart Home
skills.description: Develop and troubleshoot Alexa Smart Home skills, device discovery, state reporting, and proactive events
examples: Create a Smart Home skill for a custom IoT thermostat device
Implement device discovery and state reporting for a smart light
Set up proactive state updates using the Alexa Event Gateway

skills.name: Long-Running Task Executor
skills.description: Execute complex, multi-step tasks that require extended processing time — code generation, data analysis, infrastructure provisioning, and batch operations
examples: Generate a complete microservice with tests, Dockerfile, and CI/CD pipeline
Analyze a large dataset and produce a summary report with visualizations
Provision a multi-region AWS infrastructure stack with monitoring
